title: LocalStorage Function-call via eval()
description: DOM-based XSS that reads a value from localStorage and passes it into eval() inside a function-invocation context.
objectives: Trace how the 'input' key flows from localStorage.getItem() into eval().
Break out of the surrounding processInput(...) call to execute arbitrary JavaScript.
Confirm the payload persists across reloads until localStorage is cleared.
hints: The value is inlined as eval('processInput(' + storedValue + ')') — close the paren, run your JS, and comment the trailing ')' out.
Reset the state with localStorage.removeItem('input') or localStorage.clear().
body:
LocalStorage -> eval() (function-call context)

Set localStorage.input to control the argument passed into processInput().
